articles.title: Dollar Tumbles on Optimism US-Iran War Nearing an End

articles.expand: Gold (XAU/USD) rallies on Wednesday as the US Dollar (USD) and Oil prices tumble on hopes that the United States and Iran could reach a deal to end the war in the Middle East.

articles.expand: RBNZ board member Professor Prasanna Gai says the Hormuz supply shock does not imply reflexive tightening, but has raised the neutral rate.
